## Summary

Describe the change in a few lines.

## Type

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI
- [ ] Maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run smoke`
- [ ] `npm run package:check`
- [ ] `npm run pack:dry-run`
- [ ] `npm run check`

## Security

- [ ] I did not add a real `.env` or environment override file.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, tokens, credentials, private keys, certificates, personal data, or sensitive logs.
- [ ] I did not add internal `.sdd-master/` content from a consumer project.
- [ ] I reviewed generated files and package contents.

## Scope

- [ ] The change stays within the stated phase or issue scope.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] No publish, release, remote creation, or push automation was added.
